label: Transfer Panel
description: Initiate venue-to-venue, sub-account, withdrawal, and deposit transfer flows with fee preview.

0.5.note: No lib/mocks imports in widget file.

0.6.note: FormWidget receives isLoading; loading state handled.

0.7.note: Empty state: balances.length===0 guard shows 'No accounts available. Connect a venue...'

0.8.note: Error: contextError.message and submitError both surface via displayError → FormWidget.

1.1.note: Data from useAccountsData() — balances and addTransferEntry.

1.3.note: Venue dropdowns populated from balances which are org-filtered in context.

1.4.note: No client sub-filter — transfer panel is account-level.

1.6.note: organizationIds=[] → all venues shown in dropdowns.

1.7.note: CEFI_VENUES/NETWORKS/SUB_ACCOUNTS imported from lib/config/services/accounts.config — correct location.

l1.notes: Clean data flow. Reference data in lib/config/ ✓. 1.4/1.5 N/A.

l2.notes: Globally satisfied per spec §L2 2026-04-17 update. Commits 32ba8ab + f9f29ea.

3.1.note: Mode relevance: live ✓ (real transfers), paper ✓ (type label suffixed '(Paper)' via addTransferEntry), batch ✓ (all 4 submit handlers now guarded via guardBatch()).

3.2.note: Widget now reads useExecutionMode() directly and gates submission via guardBatch() + disables buttons when isBatch.

3.5.note: Paper mode: submitted transfers are typed with '(Paper)' suffix in history. Batch: buttons show 'Disabled in Batch' label.

l3.notes: Fixed: guardBatch() wired to all 4 submit handlers (venue→venue, sub-account, withdraw, deposit) with sonner toast 'Read-only in batch mode'. Batch-mode button labels updated. Paper-mode transfer type suffixed '(Paper)'. 3.3/3.4 human pending.

4.1.note: All onClick handlers are wired (handleVenueTransfer, handleSubAccountTransfer, handleWithdraw, handleDepositConfirm, handleCopyAddress). None are empty stubs.

4.6.note: No entitlement checks on render path.

l4.notes: Agent checks pass. 4.3/4.4/4.7/4.8 human walkthrough pending — form has 4 transfer type modes each needing visual check.

5.1.note: Target strategies: none — transfer panel supports all strategies by enabling capital movement between venues. Key use cases: capital rebalancing for basis trade, margin top-up for leveraged strategies, withdrawal after strategy close.

l5.notes: 5.1 documented. 5.2–5.6 require human walkthrough (form completeness for each transfer type).

l6.notes: L6 deferred — tests not written this pass.

7.1.note: No hex/rgb/hsl. emerald-400/amber-400/blue-500 are Tailwind named colors (allowed by L7.1 which targets hex/rgb/hsl only).

7.2.note: No mock imports. Config from lib/config/services/accounts.config.

7.3.note: 447 lines — within 500-line limit. AccountsTransferWidget function is 413 lines. Large but single responsibility (4 tab modes). Acceptable for now.

7.4.note: AccountsTransferWidget: PascalCase ✓. File: accounts-transfer-widget.tsx kebab-case ✓. TYPE_PILLS: SCREAMING_SNAKE_CASE const ✓.

7.5.note: Out of scope — English-only UI per product decision 2026-04-21; 7.5 reassigned to UTC datetime rendering

7.7.note: availableUsd and amountNum are simple derived values, not requiring memoization. No inline objects in effect deps. No useEffect.

l7.notes: All mechanical checks pass. 7.5 deferred. File size at 447 lines is acceptable but approaching limit — watch for future additions.

8.1.note: Fixed: replaced every text-[10px] with text-micro on lines 108, 181, 185, 222, 231, 277, 313, 420, 422, 428, 437 after text-micro token landed in globals.css.

8.3.note: Uses Button, Input, Select, FormWidget shared primitives throughout.

8.4.note: Agent: no without alt.

8.5.note: Human resize test at minW=3/minH=4 pending.

l8.notes: 8.1/8.2/8.3 clean. 8.4 partial — label association needs human a11y verification. 8.5 human pending.

keepSeparate.rationale: Transfer panel is an action form — distinct function from the read-only balance table and history table. Keep separate.

relationships.notes: Peer to accounts-transfer-history — addTransferEntry() in shared context writes to history. Tight coupling by design.

dataContract.mockSource: lib/mocks/fixtures/trading-data (via accounts-data-context; balances for venue free-capital preview)
dataContract.notes: Transfers are currently mock — addTransferEntry() inserts into local state. Real implementation needs REST POST to transfer API + poll for status. Available USD balance shown for UX preview.

gaps: DeFi on-chain transfer not supported — no wallet connect / EVM tx signing
Batch mode does not disable form submission
htmlFor/id pairing not used for labels — a11y gap
coverage.notes: Transfer types: venue-to-venue, sub-account, withdraw, deposit. All four modes covered in widget.

knownIssues.note: accounts-data-context.tsx imports MOCK_SAFTS from lib/mocks/fixtures/trading-pages and re-exports SAFTRecord from the same mock file. Context file cleanup deferred.

RESOLVED 2026-04-21: guardBatch() now blocks all 4 transfer submit paths in batch mode (sonner toast + disabled buttons). Paper-mode transfers flagged with '(Paper)' suffix in addTransferEntry type string.

findings.description: accounts-transfer-widget.tsx — ~32 user-visible strings not wrapped in i18n helpers
findings.fix: Retired 7.5 i18n check: English-only UI per product decision 2026-04-21

findings.description: accounts-transfer-widget.tsx:108,181,185,222,231,277,313,420,422,428,437 — text-[10px] arbitrary typography, no text-2xs token exists
findings.fix: Replaced every text-[10px] occurrence with text-micro in accounts-transfer-widget.tsx (pill buttons L108, summary lines L181/L185, direction pills L222/L231, speed panel L277, withdraw available label L313, deposit address panel L420/L422/L428/L437).

findings.description: accounts-transfer-widget.tsx — <label> elements use text-node proximity not htmlFor/id pairing; screen-reader association unverified
findings.deferReason: requires human a11y walkthrough to confirm screen-reader reads labels correctly before fixing label pattern

findings.description: accounts-transfer-widget.tsx — no batch-mode gate; all 4 submit handlers accepted clicks in batch replay mode and entered fake history rows
findings.fix: Added useExecutionMode() + guardBatch() helper; all 4 handlers now short-circuit with a sonner toast when isBatch. Submit buttons disabled and labelled 'Disabled in Batch'. Paper-mode transfer types suffixed '(Paper)'.

findings.description: accounts-data-context.tsx — addTransferEntry timestamp used toLocaleString without timeZone:'UTC' so transfer history shows viewer-local time
findings.fix: Added timeZone:'UTC' to the toLocaleString call in addTransferEntry. Transfers now timestamped in UTC in history.
